---
title: "Roadmaps"
---

## Purpose

The roadmaps help you move through the site in dependency-aware order instead of guessing what to study next.

## Available Roadmaps

- [Core Foundation](core-foundation.qmd)
- [Theory Reading Track](theory-reading.qmd)
- [AI / ML Theory](ai-ml-theory.qmd)

Later, this section can expand further into `engineering systems` and topic-specific research tracks.
